productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Motel Color Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with grey ribbing around the neckline, grey raglan sleeves, and graphic and felted outlines on the frontFittingSlimWash care Hand wash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Get into the travel mode with this black tee from wrangler. The graphic on the front is inspired by long journeys and neon motel signs on the roadside. Team this tee with jeans and rugged shoes for casual outings with friends, while the cotton fabric keeps you dry and comfortable through all seasons. Add on a pair of stylish footwear from the wide international range available at myntra and stay cool and comfortable through all seasons in this pure cotton tee.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
